message.content:
For the **Katy/Houston area**, the strongest matches from the results are **Ageless MedSpa Katy**, **Hotze Health & Wellness Center**, **Allay Med Spa**, **4Ever Glow MedSpa**, and **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness**; several of these specifically advertise HydraFacial services in Katy.[1][3][6][7][5]

If you want the **best overall option**, the most defensible choice from the available results is **Ageless MedSpa Katy** because it is explicitly a Katy-based med spa serving the surrounding area and has a dedicated HydraFacial service page.[1] **Hotze Health & Wellness Center** is also a strong Katy option because it lists a specific Katy address and a direct contact number for Hydrafacial treatment.[3]

A quick practical shortlist:

- **Ageless MedSpa Katy** — Katy location with a dedicated HydraFacial page.[1]
- **Hotze Health & Wellness Center** — Katy location at 20214 Braidwood Drive, with HydraFacial contact info.[3]
- **Allay Med Spa** — HydraFacial treatment page for Katy and Kingwood.[6]
- **4Ever Glow MedSpa** — Katy med spa advertising HydraFacials and other advanced skincare.[7]
- **Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness** — Katy med spa, though the result is more general and does not specifically show HydraFacial in the snippet.[5]

If you want, I can narrow this to the **best-reviewed**, **most luxury**, or **most affordable** HydraFacial provider in Katy/Houston if you want me to compare these options more specifically.
